chunks.en: When I choose what to wear, first I check the weather on my phone.
chunks.ja: 何を着るか選ぶとき、まずスマホで天気を確認します。

chunks.en: First I check if it's hot or cold outside today.
chunks.ja: まず、今日外が暑いか寒いかを確かめます。

chunks.en: How I pick my clothes depends on my plans for the day.
chunks.ja: 服の選び方は、その日の予定によって変わります。

chunks.en: On work days I wear a simple shirt, but on days off I wear jeans.
chunks.ja: 仕事の日はシンプルなシャツを着ますが、休みの日はジーンズを履きます。

chunks.en: My favorite thing to wear is a soft hoodie because it's very comfortable.
chunks.ja: お気に入りの服は柔らかいパーカーで、とても楽だからです。

chunks.en: Sometimes it takes a long time because I can't decide what looks good.
chunks.ja: 時々、何が似合うか決められなくて時間がかかります。

outline: Opening: I start by checking the weather
Point 1: I pick clothes based on work or day off
Wrap-up: Some days it takes a long time to decide

modelTalk.text: Every morning, I think about what to wear. First I check the weather. I look outside or I check my phone. Is it hot or cold today? Is it going to rain? Then I choose my clothes. If I work today, I wear something nice and clean. If it's my day off, I wear easy, comfortable clothes. I love my old blue jeans. They feel soft, and I wear them a lot. I also like my big grey shirt. It's very warm. Some days I can't decide. I try one shirt, then another shirt. Nothing feels right. I look at the clock, and I'm late! So I just pick something simple. In the end, comfortable clothes make me happy. What do you wear today? Do you think about it a lot, like me?

chunks.en: The first thing I do is check the weather to see if it's hot or cold.
chunks.ja: まず最初にするのは、暑いか寒いかを確かめるために天気をチェックすることです。

chunks.en: When I pick my clothes, I think about whether I have work or a day off.
chunks.ja: 服を選ぶときは、仕事があるのか休みなのかを考えます。

chunks.en: My favorite thing to wear is a comfortable hoodie with jeans on relaxed days.
chunks.ja: 私のお気に入りは、のんびりした日に着る楽なパーカーとジーンズです。

chunks.en: On some days it takes a long time because I can't decide what looks good.
chunks.ja: 何が似合うか決められなくて、時間がかかる日もあります。

chunks.en: In the end, I usually just choose something simple so I'm not late for work.
chunks.ja: 結局はたいてい、仕事に遅れないようにシンプルなものを選びます。

outline: Opening: I start by checking the weather
Point 1: I pick clothes based on work or day off
Point 2: My favorite comfy clothes, and slow days when I can't decide
Wrap-up: I keep it simple to save time

modelTalk.text: Every morning, I start by checking the weather. I want to know if it's hot or cold. So I look out the window, and I check my phone too. Then I think about my day. If I'm working, I pick something clean and simple. But if it's my day off, I just want to feel relaxed. I have a favorite grey hoodie, and I wear it a lot. It's soft, and it's really easy to wear. Most days, choosing clothes is quick and simple for me. But sometimes I just can't decide what to wear. I try one shirt, then another, and nothing feels right. On those days, it takes me way too long. In the end, I usually go back to my comfy clothes. And honestly, that's always a good choice for me.
